topic: how to be legende in boxing

payload.character_role: Experienced boxing coach and former professional boxer specializing in elite athlete development and fight strategy, guiding aspiring boxers through the nuanced path to legendary status.
prompt_additions: Include detailed demonstrations of advanced footwork drills emphasizing ring control and evasive maneuvers.
Showcase periodized training cycles that build peak conditioning timed for fight competition.
Integrate mental conditioning exercises such as visualization techniques and stress management strategies.
Highlight tactical analysis segments explaining how to read opponents and adapt mid-fight.
Demonstrate recovery methods including active rest days and injury prevention protocols.
Use real-world examples of legendary boxers’ styles and training adaptations to inspire and instruct.
Emphasize the importance of disciplined sparring sessions with feedback for continuous improvement.
